headline: Equity Residential Dividend Increase And 2026 Meeting Set Against Valuation Gap
summary: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) declared its regular quarterly dividends on common and preferred shares, including an increase to the common dividend. The company also set the date for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. These announcements update investors on shareholder returns and upcoming governance milestones. Equity Residential, a major U.S. multifamily real estate owner and operator, sits at the intersection of housing demand, interest rate conditions and capital markets. For...
